title: ‘Will protest at Jantar Mantar’: JK Dy CM Choudhary warns Modi Govt over statehood delay
description: The erstwhile state of Jammu and Kashmir was reorganised into the Union territories of Jammu and Kashmir and Ladakh following the abrogation of Article 370 in August 2019. Prime Minister Narendra Modi-led Union government has promised the return of statehood to Jammu and Kashmir.
